about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn more about VietWay and our mission
about.heroSubtitle: We craft meaningful travel experiences that connect you with the world's most extraordinary destinations and cultures.

intro.title: Your Journey Begins Here
intro.content: Founded with a passion for authentic travel, VietWay has been helping travelers discover the world's hidden gems for over a decade. We believe that the best journeys are those that leave a lasting impact—on both the traveler and the communities they visit.

story.title: From Wanderlust to Purpose
story.content: What started as a small group of travel enthusiasts has grown into a trusted travel partner for thousands of explorers worldwide. Our founders, seasoned travelers themselves, noticed a gap in the market—travelers seeking more than just a vacation. They wanted transformation, connection, and stories worth telling. That's exactly what we deliver.
story.highlight: Over 10 years of creating unforgettable journeys across 50+ countries.

mission.title: Crafting Unforgettable Travel Experiences
mission.content: We believe that travel has the power to transform lives. Our mission is to connect travelers with authentic experiences that go beyond the ordinary tourist path, creating meaningful connections with local cultures and communities.

curated.title: Curated Experiences
curated.description: Every destination handpicked for authentic, meaningful encounters that transcend ordinary travel.

personal.title: Personal Touch
personal.description: Tailored itineraries designed around your preferences, creating journeys as unique as you are.

trusted.title: Trusted Expertise
trusted.description: Years of experience ensuring seamless, worry-free travel with support every step of the way.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Travel
sustainable.description: Committed to responsible tourism that benefits local communities and preserves destinations for future generations.

items.title: Expert Local Guides
items.description: Connect with passionate locals who share insider knowledge and hidden gems.

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.description: Our dedicated team is always available to assist you, wherever you are.

items.title: Flexible Planning
items.description: Customize every aspect of your journey to match your preferences and pace.

items.title: Best Value
items.description: Premium experiences at competitive prices with no hidden fees.
